chapter_title.en: Chapter on Advancing or Delaying the Rituals

text: 3092 - وَ رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي رَجُلٍ نَسِيَ أَنْ يَذْبَحَ بِمِنًى حَتَّى زَارَ اَلْبَيْتَ فَاشْتَرَى بِمَكَّةَ ثُمَّ نَحَرَهَا قَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ قَدْ أَجْزَأَ عَنْهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3092 - Muawiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as) regarding a man who forgot to slaughter in Mina until he visited the Kaaba, then purchased an animal in Mecca and slaughtered it.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm; it suffices for him."
